onset.Description: Onset of the event measured from the beginning of the recording.

sample.Description: Onset of the event measured in samples (relative to the start of the recording).

value.Description: Numeric trigger code recorded with the event. The events.tsv files in this dataset use only two codes (10 and 11); the original HED annotation block carried by the OpenNeuro source applied to a richer 107-code trigger scheme that does not match the codes actually present in this rehosted version, and has been removed to keep the sidecar consistent with the actual data.
